title: Recursive self-join with CTE
prompt: Write `MyApp.Blog.thread_comments/1` that takes a root comment id and returns all descendants using a recursive CTE. Assume `Comment` has a `parent_id` field. Use `with_cte/3` + `recursive: true`. The base case selects `c.id, c.body, 0 as depth`; recursive case joins on `parent_id`. Write to `lib/my_app/blog.ex`.
tier_rationale: Recursive CTEs in Ecto are niche — union_all + with_cte + :recursive. Rarely-used API.
